/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/mycpu_sim.dir/src/Bus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mycpu_sim.dir/src/CPU.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mycpu_sim.dir/src/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mycpu_sim.dir/src/Timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mycpu_sim.dir/src/Uart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mycpu_sim.dir/src/TestDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/mycpu_sim.dir/src/simulator_main.cpp.o -o mycpu_sim
